title: Fibonacci with Zip
code:
fib :: num -> num
fib 0 = 0
fib 1 = 1
fib n = fib (n - 1) + fib (n - 2)

fibs :: [num]
fibs = map fib [0..]

first_ten :: [num]
first_ten = take 10 fibs
description: Fibonacci defined both as a recursive function and as a lazy infinite list using `map` over `[0..]`. Miranda's lazy evaluation means `fibs` is only computed as far as needed by `take`.
